aids.title: GCBN - HOG Steps
aids.content:
**G**radients (compute magnitude and direction)
**C**ells (create histograms in 8x8 cells)
**B**locks (normalize 2x2 cell blocks)
**N**ormalize and concatenate

Remember: 'Gradients Create Better Normalizations'

aids.title: HOG Size Formula
aids.content:
For pedestrian (64x128, 8x8 cells, 2x2 blocks, 9 bins):

Blocks = (cells_x - 1) x (cells_y - 1)
       = (8-1) x (16-1) = 7 x 15 = 105

Total = blocks x cells_per_block x bins
      = 105 x 4 x 9 = 3780

aids.title: HOG as a Sketch Artist
aids.content: HOG is like a sketch artist who captures the essence of shapes. Instead of exact pixels, it records which direction edges go in each small region (cells) and how strong they are. The artist then compares regions to make sure the drawing looks consistent (block normalization).
